text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Heya! Still strutting that flair, I see!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Racer
text_block_list.text: Yo, Palmer! You'll never believe this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and I decide to drop by the
unofficial racetrack since we happen to be out
anyway, and one of her friends comes up to us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After they finish their chat, Mejiro Palmer makes
to leave, but just then...

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student A
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, the course is an actual road. It's so uneven
and unkept. Can you even run on that rocky
asphalt properly?

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student B
text_block_list.text:
I dunno about you guys, but it's a hard pass from
me. I like my knees the way they are, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Racer
text_block_list.text:
Who do you two think you are, coming here and
dissing our track?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Ah. Sorry, Trainer! Can you give me a minute?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! You two are from Tracen too, right? Is
this the first time you've been out here?

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student A
text_block_list.text:
What's it to you? Aren't you a Mejiro?
Associating with nobodies like her is only going
to make you weaker, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
A "nobody," huh? I don't think you should be
judging other runners just because they run
freestyle races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm only as strong as I am today because of how much I've run here at this track.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student A
text_block_list.text:
You've got to be kidding. Training at the
academy is obviously sooo much better!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student B
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. Running against amateurs doesn't even
count as training!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Racer
text_block_list.text: Now listen here—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about you put your theory to the test, then?
The fastest way to prove who's right is to race, so
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't leave them any room to refuse. The
other two Tracen students are swept up in the
moment and accept her challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get appointed the judge, and with spectators
watching, the race begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer boldly takes the lead right out of
the gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, you can never count Tracen Academy
athletes out of any race. The other two match her
pace and fight for the front.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the race continues to heat up, Mejiro Palmer
maintains the lead until...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Racer
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! That's what I'm talkin' about! Good job,
Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... What was with the way you broke away from us?! That was so reckless and dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! They don't teach that at the academy,
now do they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That was the runaway method that I learned from
everyone here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is showered with cheers and
applause long after the race finishes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two Tracen students must have gotten the
hint and quietly sneak away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer! I didn't mean to get dragged into
that.
choice_data_list: There's not only one type of front running, eh?
There's not only one type of front running, eh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer! I didn't mean to get dragged into
that.
choice_data_list: There's not only one type of front running, eh?
There's not only one type of front running, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how cool she looked on the track,
running at top speed for the sake of standing up
for her friend.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, that? Nah, it wasn't that serious or anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just thought it'd be a shame to bring that kind of
vibe to a nice space like this where everyone can
run the way they like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Besides, all I was doing was running away from
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a shy smile, but there's a bit more
pride in it than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You're making me blush.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But yeah. I couldn't not defend everyone. They're the reason I'm the person I am today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This place has fostered my growth and given me
so much. I won't let anyone badmouth it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, she goes on to tell me all about her
friends.
